creator: freebugs@use.startmail.com
text:
My apologies - I could have closed this myself; last weekend I ran a `pkg upgrade -f` on one of our affected systems and after that bird2 was able to start with the latest libssh installed.

It probably was caused by doing a bunch of release upgrades without doing a full pkg reinstall, causing the system to be in a bit of a weird state.

Guess this was operator error :/

Note that I still have 6 of these systems left, in case anyone is looking for gory details.
